name: Katuki
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Primarily pacifies Kapha and Pitta; strongest liver purgative.
API/AFI Adherence: Rhizomes used; core of Arogyavardhini Vati.
Specific Indications: Hepatitis, Jaundice, Fever, Obesity.
mainMedicinalUses: Liver Health: Best herb for viral hepatitis and bile stimulation.
Digestive Regulation: Scrapes toxins (Ama) from the digestive tract.
Skin Conditions: Purifies blood for psoriasis and eczema.
Fever Management: Effective antipyretic for chronic fevers.
plantProfile: History: High-altitude Himalayan herb used for centuries for liver care.
Environment: Found at 3000-5000m in the Himalayas.
